description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 Docker image, defines three stages (build, test, deploy), and sets variables MAVEN_CLI_OPTS to "-s ci_settings.xml --batch-mode" and MAVEN_OPTS to "-Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/repository". Add a build job in the build stage that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS compile" and caches the .m2/repository/ and target/ paths. Add a test job in the test stage that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test" using the same cache. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy" and is limited to the master branch only.
